title: feat: report embed height from playground and websim
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Makes the `/play` iframe size to its app's content so there's no scrollbar inside the iframe.

- Playground and Websim now call `useReportEmbedHeight` when embedded and drop `min-h-dvh`, so each reports its natural content height instead of padding to the iframe viewport.
- Standalone behavior unchanged — height reporting only fires inside a frame; `min-h-dvh` is kept when not embedded.

Depends on #11792, which adds `@pollinations/ui/embed` (the shared hook + the host-side listener in `/play`). No file overlap with #11792, so no merge conflict — but merge #11792 first; this won't build until that lands.

gist.headline: Perfectly sized playgrounds
gist.blurb: Embedded apps now automatically resize to fit their content perfectly. No more awkward double scrollbars when playing with Websim or the Playground!
gist.summary: Playground and Websim apps now report their natural content height via the `useReportEmbedHeight` hook when embedded, eliminating internal scrollbars in the `/play` iframe.
gist.impact: Users viewing embedded apps will experience a seamless, perfectly sized interface without double scrollbars, while standalone apps retain their normal viewport height.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the monitor robot adjusting a picture frame or window to perfectly fit a beautiful digital landscape, representing the dynamic resizing of the iframe.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-headed robot working together to adjust a glowing lime green (#ecf874) picture frame so it perfectly fits a beautiful digital garden inside. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
